title: Doctor: orphaned phases & reports
goal: mini doctor gains two phase-hygiene checks: phases stuck in 'doing' with no open work left (pointing at mini done) and stale run reports in .mini/run/ with no matching phase; both pure and unit-tested, plus docs.

steps.title: Orphaned-doing & stale-report checks (pure)
steps.detail: Add orphanedDoingPhases + staleRunReports to DoctorInput and two checks to buildDiagnostics (only when a project exists): a warn naming phases stuck in 'doing' (hint: mini done) and one counting stale run reports. Covered by unit tests.

steps.title: findStaleRunReports helper + gathering
steps.detail: Pure helper that picks phase-<id>.md report files (not .prev.md) with no matching phase; doctor() loads the full state, derives orphaned-doing via isOrphanedDoing and lists .mini/run/. Helper unit-tested.

steps.title: Docs
steps.detail: Document the two new checks in docs/non-interactive/doctor.md.
